title: Document abfall vendoring and upstream repository link

source.subject: docs(abfall): document Beskid vendoring and upstream repository link

body:
Document Beskid vendoring and upstream repository link.

## Platform specification
- Tracks normative content in [Memory and GC runtime contract](https://beskid-lang.org/platform-spec/execution/runtime/memory-and-gc-runtime-contract) (`/platform-spec/execution/runtime/memory-and-gc-runtime-contract`) *(required)*

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`4e5bfca`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/4e5bfca)
- **Subject:** docs(abfall): document Beskid vendoring and upstream repository link
- **Completed:** 2026-05-20

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.2 (Analysis, packages, and platform spec)
- **Workstream:** `codegen-runtime`
- **Deliverable:** `v02-concurrency-runtime`
- **Domain:** `execution`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **Fibers, channels, and GC runtime** (`v02-concurrency-runtime`).
